name: event_name
description: Snake_case event name from sGTM (page_view, click_nav, product_view, purchase, etc.)

name: timestamp
description: Client-side ISO 8601 timestamp (event parameter from data layer)

name: received_timestamp
description: Server-side epoch milliseconds when sGTM processed the event

name: session_id
description: Session identifier from first-party cookie (event parameter)

name: client_id
description: GA4 client ID from cookie (sGTM Common Event Data)

name: page_location
description: Full page URL (sGTM Common Event Data)

name: page_referrer
description: Full referrer URL (sGTM Common Event Data)

name: user_agent
description: User agent string (sGTM Common Event Data)

name: ip_override
description: Client IP (sGTM Common Event Data, anonymized in Dataform staging)

name: utm_source
description: UTM source parameter (google, facebook, tiktok, email, etc.)

name: utm_medium
description: UTM medium parameter (cpc, paid_social, email, organic, etc.)

name: utm_campaign
description: UTM campaign name — raw value, may contain inconsistent naming

name: iap_source
description: Flag indicating event came from iampatterson data generator ('true')

name: iap_session_id
description: IAP-specific session ID (UUID, mirrors session_id for generator events)

name: product_price
description: Product unit price in USD (product_view, add_to_cart events)

name: item_count
description: Number of items in cart/order (begin_checkout, purchase events)

name: products
description: JSON-serialized product array [{product_id, product_name, price, quantity}] (purchase events)

name: plan_id
description: Subscription plan identifier (plan_select, trial_signup, renewal, churn events)

name: plan_name
description: Subscription plan display name (plan_select, trial_signup, renewal, churn events)

name: plan_price
description: Subscription plan monthly price in USD (plan_select, trial_signup events)

name: renewal_month
description: Renewal month number since signup (subscription_renewal events)

name: qualification_tier
description: Lead qualification tier: high, medium, low (lead_qualify events)

name: dismissal_mode
description: How the first-session nav hint was dismissed: scroll, click_outside, timeout (nav_hint_dismissed events, Phase 9E deliverable 9; click_session_pulse removed post-UAT — clicks on SessionPulse are conversions, tracked by click_cta + cta_location='session_pulse')

name: source
description: Tab landing source: default_landing (overlay opened onto this tab) or manual_select (tab clicked from the tabs bar) — carried by overview_tab_view, timeline_tab_view, consent_tab_view (Phase 9E deliverable 9)

name: destination
description: Portal link destination: services, about, contact (portal_click events, Phase 9E deliverable 9)

name: threshold
description: Coverage threshold crossed: 25, 50, 75, 100 (coverage_milestone events, Phase 9E deliverable 9)
